t-1.notes: feature: phase lifecycle · InsertRelative/MoveRelative/RenameInArray @ internal/phase/phase.go · pure slice helpers (anchor-relative insert/move, in-place rename, ErrAnchorNotFound, no-op detection) underpinning insert/move/rename

t-2.notes: feature: phase lifecycle · snapshotPhases/assertUntouched @ internal/cmd/phase_lifecycle_test.go · self-tested byte-for-byte fingerprint harness (dir files + milestone array slot) proving lifecycle ops leave siblings untouched

t-3.notes: feature: phase lifecycle · phaseMove + resolveAnchor/loadCurrentMilestone/refuseIfShipped @ internal/cmd/phase_lifecycle.go · dross phase move reorders the milestone array (anchor-validated, ship-guarded, no-op aware), touching no phase dir

t-4.notes: feature: phase lifecycle · phaseInsert @ internal/cmd/phase_lifecycle.go · dross phase insert scaffolds a phase (strict Slugify, no auto-suffix) and splices it at --after/--before, siblings untouched

t-5.notes: feature: phase lifecycle · phaseRename + repointDeferredTarget @ internal/cmd/phase_lifecycle.go · dross phase rename moves dir/id/array/deferred-targets/branch atomically, siblings untouched, collision-safe
